'''tawotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enamovirus|enamovirus]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-w-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enamovirus|enamovirus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tawotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæwetheth|tæwetheth]] || [[word:tæwethej|tæwethej]] || [[word:tæwethesh|tæwethesh]] || [[word:tæwethe|tæwethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tawowothoth|tawowothoth]] || [[word:tawowothoj|tawowothoj]] || [[word:tawowothosh|tawowothosh]] || [[word:tawowotho|tawowotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tawothoth|tawothoth]] || [[word:tawothoj|tawothoj]] || [[word:tawothosh|tawothosh]] || [[word:tawotho|tawotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tawofthoth|tawofthoth]] || [[word:tawofthoj|tawofthoj]] || [[word:tawofthosh|tawofthosh]] || [[word:tawofthof|tawofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tawothotho|tawothotho]] || [[word:tawothojo|tawothojo]] || [[word:tawothosho|tawothosho]] || [[word:tawothoko|tawothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tawothoth|tawothoth]] || [[word:tawothoj|tawothoj]] || [[word:tawothosh|tawothosh]] || [[word:tawotho|tawotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tawothothol|tawothothol]] || [[word:tawothojol|tawothojol]] || [[word:tawothoshol|tawothoshol]] || [[word:tawothokol|tawothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tawothothotho|tawothothotho]] || [[word:tawothojojo|tawothojojo]] || [[word:tawothoshosho|tawothoshosho]] || [[word:tawothoko|tawothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tawothothon|tawothothon]] || [[word:tawothojon|tawothojon]] || [[word:tawothoshon|tawothoshon]] || [[word:tawothokon|tawothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tawothothoro|tawothothoro]] || [[word:tawothojoro|tawothojoro]] || [[word:tawothoshoro|tawothoshoro]] || [[word:tawothokoro|tawothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
